title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Cisco India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Cisco India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Cisco India South Asia Partners in Mysuru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cisco India South Asia Partners:
Cisco India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cisco India South Asia Partners!
